about.name: Biken Timalsina
about.title: Cybersecurity Professional
about.summary: Results driven Cybersecurity graduate with academic and industry experience across governance, risk and compliance, vulnerability assessment, and secure application development, applying ISO 27001 and NIST aligned controls to real-world organisational environments.

projects.title: Ecommerce Website & Mobile App
projects.description: Developed a full-featured web-based ecommerce platform with a companion mobile application, handling product listings, cart, and user authentication.

projects.title: Smoking & Mask Detection System
projects.description: Built a real-time computer vision model to detect smoking activity and improper mask usage using deep learning and image processing techniques.

projects.title: TCP Session Hijacking Lab
projects.description: Simulated TCP session hijacking in a controlled Kali Linux lab environment and documented comprehensive mitigation strategies and defensive controls.

projects.title: Staff Hire & Fire Application
projects.description: Designed and implemented a Java-based application to manage end-to-end employee hiring and termination workflows with a structured data model.

projects.title: Binary to Decimal Converter
projects.description: Built a robust Python command-line tool that converts binary numbers to decimal, with full input validation and error handling.

experience.title: Cyber Security Review Contributor
bullets: Performed organisational cyber security gap analysis and risk identification
Recommended controls aligned with ISO 27001 and NIST frameworks
Delivered structured risk summary to support governance improvements

experience.title: Security Research Analyst Intern
bullets: Conducted compliance assessments aligned with SOC 2 and ISO 27001
Reviewed security documentation and summarised control effectiveness
Researched vulnerabilities and documented mitigation strategies
Collaborated with senior analysts to improve reporting accuracy

education.title: Master of Cyber Security
bullets: Advanced studies in threat intelligence, digital forensics, and security architecture
Applied ISO 27001 and NIST-aligned controls in organisational contexts
